description_long: This is a handheld digital video camera with a prominent 32x zoom lens and a textured grip for secure handling. The camera features a flip-out LCD screen for live viewing and playback, as well as multiple control buttons and ports on the side, including HDMI and SD card slots. The lens barrel is marked with '25mm WIDE' and 'Comon', indicating a wide-angle capability. The rear of the camera has a battery compartment and a warning label, while the side grip is covered in a brown, textured material for comfort. The camera body is primarily matte black and gray, with some red and orange accent rings. The overall design is compact and ergonomic, suitable for portable use in urban environments.
description: A compact handheld video camera with a 32x zoom lens, flip-out LCD screen, and textured grip, finished in black, gray, and orange accents. Features include multiple control buttons, ports, and a wide-angle lens.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 32x zoom lens, textured grip, control buttons, HDMI and SD card slots, and a detached battery.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flip-out LCD screen, battery compartment with warning label, and the back of the lens.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the textured grip, top control buttons, and the lens barrel with red accent ring.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wide-angle lens marked '25mm WIDE' and 'Comon', with the LCD screen flipped out to the side.
